title: Compile + gate-triage authoritative Ewing model roster (MODEL-ROSTER.md)
context: The candidate pool of Ewing models (A673, SK-ES-1, RD-ES, TC-71, TC-32, SK-N-MC, EW8, CHLA-9/10/25, and roughly two dozen others) must be compiled into an RRID-keyed candidate backlog and gate-triaged; no model becomes a catalog entry until it passes the per-model gate. Standing guardrails bind this task: open-access sources only (no dbGaP/EGA/biobank/controlled-access); COSMIC/OncoKB are link-only; donor fields are published-only with no re-identification or external linkage; every assertion carries field-level provenance; the deliverable is de-identified research metadata, never patient data and never a clinical/therapeutic recommendation.
objective: Compile MODEL-ROSTER.md as the RRID-keyed candidate funnel with a gate disposition for every candidate.
acceptanceCriteria: MODEL-ROSTER.md lists candidate Ewing lines keyed by RRID with DepMap/Cell Model Passports cross-IDs and each source's license disposition.
Every candidate assigned a gate disposition (PASS / FLAG / EXCLUDE) with rationale; no model promoted to an entry task without a committed gate artifact.
Known-misidentified lines are retained on the roster with their warning (not silently dropped) so they can be catalogued with the flag.
Controlled-access-only models (no open data) are excluded; COSMIC/OncoKB-only data marked link-only.
resources: ICLAC Register of Misidentified Cell Lines
output: MODEL-ROSTER.md RRID-keyed, gate-triaged candidate roster, committed to the repo.
